message:
feat(models): add codex-spark registry entry and xhigh thinking support

Introduce built-in model support for the OpenAI Codex Spark variant and align high-thinking capability checks with the expanded Codex family.

Detailed changes:

- Added a defensive built-in model insertion path for \ when missing from the assembled registry.

- Configured the new entry with OpenAI Codex Responses API routing, chatgpt.com backend base URL, text+image input support, and expanded context/token limits.

- Extended \ logic to recognize \ as a model that supports xhigh thinking mode.

- Updated unit tests and model capability matrix assertions to include the new Codex Spark branch in xhigh support expectations.

Why this grouping:

This commit is strictly model-catalog and capability-resolution behavior; it intentionally avoids transport/runtime and docs-only edits for clean traceability.
